metadata.description: Antigravity CLI integration for Claude Code — delegate tasks to Google's `agy` from inside your editor. Fork of simplybychris/antigravity-plugin-cc, extended toward feature parity with openai/codex-plugin-cc (background jobs, branch review, adversarial review, optional review gate).

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Use the Google Antigravity CLI (`agy`) from Claude Code. Synchronous Bash wrapper: /agy:setup, /agy:ask, /agy:delegate, /agy:research, /agy:review, /agy:image, /agy:scrape, /agy:doc-to-md, /agy:help. Node.js companion for stateful workflows: /agy:rescue (background-capable), /agy:status, /agy:result, /agy:cancel. Read-only commands run agy outside your repo; secret-scan + SSRF/path deny-lists guard what's sent to Gemini. Per-call model selection via --model.
